response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: The reference JSON did not contain lyrics, which is consistent with the audio since the latter portion (from 00:43 onwards) is entirely instrumental with no vocals.
2. JSON Usage: Fully transcribed the spoken conversational segment manually. Instrumental outro had no vocals, so no subtitles were generated after 00:41.000 in accordance with the Ghost Subtitles rule.
3. Timing & Pacing: Timed tightly to match Kazama Iroha's energetic and fast-paced speech, ensuring natural sentence breaks.

subtitles.original: ちょっと皆さん 各自で回収って形で それだけが申し訳ないんですが
subtitles.english: I'm sorry you have to go collect it yourselves, but...
I have a souvenir for you!

subtitles.original: ぜひ気になったら コンビニでプリントしてみてください！
subtitles.english: So if you're interested, please try printing it at a convenience store!

subtitles.original: そして コンビニプリント購入できるのは 7月21日 17時59分までです
subtitles.english: Also, the convenience store prints are available until July 21st at 5:59 PM!

subtitles.original: 概要欄に写真購入のリンク 多分今マネちゃんがやってくれていると思いますので よろしくお願いします！
subtitles.english: I think my manager is setting up the link to buy the photos in the description right now, so please check it out!

subtitles.original: そしてこの後はですね MVの公開と
subtitles.english: And after this, we have the MV release,

subtitles.original: メンバーシップ限定のアンコールライブありますので
そちらも絶対聞きに来てくださいね！
subtitles.english: so you absolutely must come listen to that too!

subtitles.original: それでは皆さん またお会いしましょう！
subtitles.english: Well then, everyone, let's meet again!
It was the best birthday ever!
